OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Deborah Schweizer, Clerk Carla Amador, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Ella Hutchinson, property manager, appearing on behalf of plaintiff Aspen South Hills Apartments, A California Limited Partnership.
Michael Sherwood Rossoff representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Janice Harris AKA J. Harris is present.
Sarah C. Marriott representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was not filed. This case settled, the trial date of September 10, 2007 is vacated.
